inputs.label: Normal Day Calorie Intake
inputs.businessContext: Average calorie consumption on normal eating days.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average calorie consumption on normal eating days.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Normal yeme günlerinde ortalama kalori tüketimi.

inputs.label: Fasting Day Calorie Intake
inputs.businessContext: Calorie intake on fasting days (often 0-500 kcal).

businessContext_i18n.en: Calorie intake on fasting days (often 0-500 kcal).

inputs.label: Number of Days
inputs.businessContext: Total number of days to calculate for the regimen.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of days to calculate for the regimen.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rejim için hesaplanacak toplam gün sayısı.

inputs.label: Starting Day Type
inputs.businessContext: 0 if starting with a normal day, 1 if starting with a fasting day.

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 if starting with a normal day, 1 if starting with a fasting day.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Normal günle başlıyorsa 0, oruç günüyle başlıyorsa 1.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
